organization.organization_background: Utkrusht is a proof-of-skills marketplace that helps agile teams find talent with strong fundamental concepts within days. We help aspiring professionals improve their profile with continuous improvement in their skills, documenting their journey and helping them fulfill their potential. We primarily build, conduct, proctor and disseminate proof-of-skill assessments in Technical domains like AI, ML, Fullstack development, High scale distributed systems, DevOps etc but do help non-tech roles like Sales, HR, Marketing etc

role_context: A Python/FastAPI software engineer with 3-5 years of experience is expected to demonstrate intermediate system design skills within the Python ecosystem. They should be able to decompose a monolithic FastAPI application into bounded services, design async-first architectures with proper event loop management, choose between background task strategies (FastAPI BackgroundTasks vs Celery vs ARQ) based on workload characteristics, design data access layers with SQLAlchemy 2.0 async and connection pooling, architect caching strategies with Redis, design event-driven integrations using Kafka or RabbitMQ with Python async consumers, implement resilience patterns with tenacity and circuit breakers, and define observability strategies using Python ecosystem tools (structlog, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus). They should understand Uvicorn/Gunicorn deployment models, GIL implications, and container resource sizing. The assessment evaluates their ability to make and justify architecture decisions specific to the Python/FastAPI ecosystem and communicate them clearly in a written design document.
